HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT QI H. HUANG'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. QI H. HUANG HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. DISCOVERY 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF CLAIMANT QI H. HUANG). JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S MONTHLY EXPENSES ARE $3450.14, INCLUDING THE MORTGAGES AND CAR PAYMENT LISTED ON PAGE 2 OF THE FINANCIAL STATEMENT. EVEN INCLUDING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S SPOUSE'S INCOME, JUDGMENT DEBTOR HAS SHOWN THAT MOST OF HER MONTHLY INCOME IS NEEDED FOR HER SUPPORT. BEGINNING DECEMBER 1, 2011, JUDGMENT DEBTOR SHALL MAKE MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $100 TOWARDS THE JUDGMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption; Ntc Of Oppos. To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Nov-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - QI H. HUANG, TEL. NO. 244-9708, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (of claimant Qi H. Huang). Judgment Debtor's Claim of Exemption is granted.
Judgment Debtor's monthly expenses are $3450.14, including the mortgages and car payment listed on page 2 of the Financial Statement. Even including Judgment Debtor's spouse's income, Judgment Debtor has shown that most of her monthly income is needed for her support.
Beginning December 1, 2011, Judgment Debtor shall make monthly payments of $100 towards the judgment. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla Miller; Not reported.
